Account.Name: Membership Dues Income
Account.Description: Annual membership dues collected at $30 per member per year

Account.Name: Plant Sale Revenue
Account.Description: Proceeds from annual and seasonal plant sale events

Account.Name: Donations Income
Account.Description: Unsolicited donations and memorial gifts from community members

Account.Name: Checking Account - Webster Bank
Account.Description: Glastonbury Garden Club operating checking account at Webster Bank

Account.Name: Savings Account - Webster Bank
Account.Description: Club reserve savings account for capital improvements and emergencies

Account.Name: Accounts Receivable
Account.Description: Outstanding member dues awaiting collection

Account.Name: Accounts Payable
Account.Description: Unpaid vendor bills outstanding

Account.Name: Supplies Expense
Account.Description: Plant pots, plant labels, seed packets, potting soil and general garden supplies

Account.Name: Venue Rental Expense
Account.Description: Room rental fees for monthly meetings and special events at community center

Account.Name: Printing & Newsletter Expense
Account.Description: Quarterly newsletter printing and postage; flyers for plant sale

Account.Name: Website Hosting Expense
Account.Description: Annual web hosting and domain renewal for glastonburygardenclub.org

Account.Name: Event Expense
Account.Description: Tables, tents, decorations and refreshments for plant sale and club events

Account.Name: Postage & Shipping
Account.Description: Stamps, postage and mailing costs for newsletters and correspondence

Account.Name: Office Supplies
Account.Description: Paper, ink cartridges, envelopes, and general office supplies for club administration

Account.Name: Retained Earnings
Account.Description: Accumulated net assets of the Glastonbury Garden Club

Account.Name: Bank Fees
Account.Description: Webster Bank monthly maintenance and transaction fees

Account.Name: PayPal Processing Fees
Account.Description: Online payment processing fees for dues paid via PayPal

Account.Name: Refreshments Expense
Account.Description: Tea, coffee, and light refreshments served at monthly meetings

Account.Name: Signage & Banners
Account.Description: Banners and signage for plant sale and club events

Account.Name: Educational Program Expense
Account.Description: Speaker honoraria and materials for monthly educational garden presentations
